## Test plan

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is scoped — no unrelated edits, formatting, or refactors
- [ ] No new dependencies, or new deps justified in the PR description
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` if the change is user-visible
